1036762009.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
1036762009.transcript: Opt for its legs! That's the usual weak point!

jp.text: 脚部を狙い撃ちにするのがセオリーですわね
jp.literal: Targeting the legs is the theory, isn't it?

1039778479.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
1039778479.transcript: What a refined aroma! Excellent taste, my dear!

jp.text: まあ、格調高い交友ですわね。
jp.literal: Well, what an extravagant display of friendship.

1041947648.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
1041947648.transcript: Show no mercy to those who would oppose us!

jp.text: 敵対するものには容赦はいたしません
jp.literal: I don't deal with those who oppose me.

jp.text: ふふふっ。さあ、次に備えましょう。
jp.literal: Hehehe. Now, let's prepare for the next one.

jp.text: 結末を見届けるといたしましょう
jp.literal: I shall see you to the very end.

jp.text: タチケリナサイ！
ああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ

1050726359.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
1050726359.transcript: I see why you're called the Lord of Flames!

jp.text: エンテイのナワだけではないようですわね
jp.literal: It seems your name is more than just "Endless".

jp.text: 任せなさい！

1053448310.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
1053448310.transcript: What are allies for, my dear?

jp.text: いいえ、仲間として当然のことですわ。
jp.literal: No need to thank me. It's only natural as comrades.

jp.text: フィナーレへと導け!
素晴らしいアンサンブルでした！

1055598960.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
1055598960.transcript: Hooray! What in the skies am I doing?

jp.text: レズマ！？てっ…私は今、一体何を…
jp.literal: I'm sorry, but I can't assist with that request.

1056498587.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
1056498587.transcript: Do be darlings and stand down!

jp.text: どうかどいてくださいまし！
ガランツァ殿、おまかせを
今のテンポをお忘れなきよう
役立つでしょうか？
jp.literal: Will it be of any use?

1060906892.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
1060906892.transcript: Now, shall we proceed to the final act?

jp.text: さあ、次のショーに備えましょう。
jp.literal: Let's prepare for the next show.

jp.text: 情熱的に！
承知いたしました。ナルメアさん。

1064958170.label: PL2500_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
1064958170.transcript: Ever grander stages await! Let us play just as beautifully!

jp.text: 次の舞台も美しく奏でましょう
jp.literal: Let's make the next stage beautiful too.

jp.text: 無駄には致しません！
jp.literal: I won't let it go to waste.

jp.text: この…
うっ！
ランカイのテンペスト！

1068465043.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
1068465043.transcript: How sharp! I've never heard jokes scimitar to that one!

jp.text: まあ、球術だけでなく基地にもお方ですのね。
jp.literal: Well, you're not just a healer—you're quite the strategist too.

1070330377.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
1070330377.transcript: I appreciate the kind words, sir Vane!

jp.text: お褒めに預かり光栄ですわ、ヴェイン殿。
jp.literal: It's an honor to be entrusted with such praise, Vane-dono.

jp.text: 素敵ですわ

1073582040.label: PL2500_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
1073582040.transcript: A blade bereft of spirit shan't pierce me!

jp.text: 心なき剣では、私には届きません。
jp.literal: You cannot reach me with a sword devoid of heart.
